description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set on a rectangular plot with a driveway leading from a main road to a detached garage. The main structure features a gable roof with a prominent front porch, supported by columns and enclosed with railings. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the dark roof and the orange-brown porch area. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front facade, with additional windows on the sides for natural light. The property is bordered by a road on one side and a body of water on the opposite side, with a well-maintained lawn surrounding the house and garage. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of suburban or semi-rural neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, front porch, detached garage, and symmetrical window arrangement, set on a grassy plot between a road and a body of water.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, and the driveway leading to the detached garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the garage, and the proximity to the water.
description_view_2: Rear view with the porch facing the water and the house's back facade visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and the house's side windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side windows
